archive_preview_empty: This archive does not contain visible entries.
archive_preview_no_matches: No archive entries match this search.
archive_preview_disabled: Archive preview is disabled by the administrator.
archive_preview_unsupported_type: Archive preview currently supports ZIP and 7z files only.
archive_preview_source_too_large: This archive exceeds the preview size limit set by the administrator.
archive_preview_invalid_zip: This file is not a valid archive.
archive_preview_encoding_failed: This filename encoding cannot decode the archive. Choose a different filename encoding and try again.
archive_preview_rejected: This archive does not meet the server preview limits.
archive_preview_extract_unsupported_entr: Some entries use names that AsterDrive cannot extract, but the archive can still be previewed.
